2606.24470.title: The Latent Bridge: A Continuous Slow-Fast Channel for Real-Time Game Agents
2606.24470.paper_summary: A real-time agent for general computer use - with games as the most demanding case - must act within tens of milliseconds while still planning over seconds. These two regimes sit at opposite ends of the latency-quality tradeoff. A reasoning VLM (Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking) deliberates effectively but requires ~1.5 s per response - far too slow for a 15 Hz control loop. In contrast, a reactive VLM (MiniCPM-o 4.5) acts in milliseconds but underperforms on planning-heavy tasks. We couple two frozen models of matched scale (9B reactive, 8B reasoning), leaving the communication channel as the sole trainable component. The standard coupling is a Text Bridge (T): the slow model writes a suffix the fast model reads. We introduce a learned continuous Latent Bridge (L) that projects the slow model's residuals into the fast model's input-embedding space in a LLaVA-style manner, avoiding any text round-trip; both are compared against Fast-Only (F). On 7 Atari games and a driving domain (MetaDrive), tuning the action decoder per channel on held-out seeds, the Latent Bridge matches or beats the Text Bridge in every domain: it significantly improves two games (MsPacman +57%, RoadRunner +28%) and is a safe drop-in elsewhere. Combining both channels interferes destructively (RoadRunner -96%), so only one should be used. The benefit is highly predictable: the bridge helps if and only if slow reasoning already beats fast reaction (T > F) - the Latent and Text gains over Fast-Only move together at r=0.93. MetaDrive is the controlled negative, where the Latent Bridge is demonstrably inert because the Text Bridge adds no value. We release replay recordings and reproducible pipelines.
2606.24470.paper_summary_zh: 一個用於一般計算機使用的即時代理——以遊戲作為最具挑戰性的案例——必須在幾十毫秒內行動，同時仍需在幾秒內進行規劃。這兩種模式位於延遲-質量權衡的兩端。一個推理型 VLM (Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking) 能有效地進行深思熟慮，但每次回應需要約 1.5 秒——對於 15 Hz 的控制迴路來說太慢了。相比之下，一個反應型 VLM (MiniCPM-o 4.5) 在毫秒內行動，但在重規劃任務上表現不佳。我們將兩個匹配規模的凍結模型（9B 反應型，8B 推理型）結合起來，將通信通道作為唯一可訓練的組件。標準的耦合是文本橋接 (T)：慢模型寫一個後綴，快模型讀取它。我們引入了一個學習的連續潛在橋接 (L)，以 LLaVA 風格的方式將慢模型的殘差投影到快模型的輸入嵌入空間，避免了任何文本的來回；兩者與僅快 (F) 進行比較。在 7 款 Atari 遊戲和一個駕駛領域 (MetaDrive) 上，針對保留種子對每個通道調整動作解碼器，潛在橋接在每個領域中都與文本橋接相匹配或超越：它顯著改善了兩款遊戲 (MsPacman +57%，RoadRunner +28%)，並且在其他地方安全可用。結合兩個通道會造成破壞性干擾 (RoadRunner -96%)，因此應僅使用一個。這一好處是高度可預測的：橋接僅在慢推理已經超越快反應時才有效 (T > F)——潛在和文本相對於僅快的增益在 r=0.93 時一起移動。MetaDrive 是受控的負例，潛在橋接顯示出無效，因為文本橋接沒有增加任何價值。我們發布了重播錄音和可重現的流程。
2606.24470.author: Bojie Li et.al.
